nasb.text: and he who invited you both will come and say to you, ‘Give your place to this man,’ and then in disgrace you proceed to occupy the last place.

esv.text: and he who invited you both will come and say to you, ‘Give your place to this person,’ and then you will begin with shame to take the lowest place.

cnv.text: 那請你又請他的人過來對你說：‘請你讓位給這個人。’那時你就慚愧地退居末位了。

ccb.text: 主人会把他带到你面前，说，‘请你把首位让给他吧！’你就要满面羞愧地退到末位去了。

csbs.text: 那邀请你们的会来对你说：‘请让座给这一位！’那时候，你就要羞惭地去坐末位了。
